description:
Court ledger in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (fl. 1100-1138 CE). Fragment of a bifolio; three columns of text are partially preserved. 

Recto: Probably a partnership agreement between two merchants. Mentions trading merchandise in different lands including Yemen ("[al-bul]dān min diyār [...] wa-diyār al-Yaman wa-ghayrhā"); Yiṣḥaq b. Makhlūf al-Nafūsī; [...] b. Yosef al-Nafūsī; Fahd b. [...]. Also mentions the term "muḍāribīn" (אלמצארבין) with unclear significance. 

Verso: Another entry in which M[...] presents a document before the court and seeks to validate its signatures; they check the court ledger (al-shimmush).
tags: qiyyum, shimmush, Halfon b. Menashshe, ib-addenda
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
